bloat_concerns.concern: signals_log.jsonl growing unboundedly (14MB)
bloat_concerns.reason: Every scan cycle appends all dimension scores. No rotation policy. Will hit disk limits before cloud launch.
bloat_concerns.action: Implement log rotation or sampling; cap at 7-day rolling window.

bloat_concerns.concern: apex_shadow_log.jsonl growing unboundedly (11MB)
bloat_concerns.reason: USE_APEX_V3_SHADOW=True logs every shadow decision. 11MB in paper mode — will be much larger live.
bloat_concerns.action: Rotate daily or cap at 10K entries. Decide shadow lifetime after activation.

bloat_concerns.concern: intelligence_schema_validator.py is 158KB — largest single file in repo
bloat_concerns.reason: Not in live import chain. Pure validation tool. 158KB is a significant maintenance burden with no live runtime value.
bloat_concerns.action: Cloud exclusion. Move to scripts/ or a CI-only directory.

bloat_concerns.concern: 23 intelligence sprint/day test files (test_intelligence_day2-7, sprint2-7c)
bloat_concerns.reason: These files tracked weekly development progress across the intelligence-first sprint series. They are not permanent regression tests. They add ~15K+ lines to the test suite and inflate test run time.
bloat_concerns.action: Move to tests/archive/ or delete after intelligence-first activation is confirmed. Keep sprint7b and sprint7c (smoke marked).

bloat_concerns.concern: backtest_intelligence.py is 100KB — second largest file
bloat_concerns.reason: Offline backtesting only. Not in live import chain. 100KB of rarely-run code inflates container size.
bloat_concerns.action: Cloud exclusion. Keep locally for research. Never deploy to live container.

bloat_concerns.concern: 5 one-time migration scripts still in scripts/
bloat_concerns.reason: All migrations completed (2026-04-28). These scripts serve no future purpose and create false confidence that they might be run again.
bloat_concerns.action: Delete now. One exception: scripts/rebuild_positions_from_intents.py is a disaster recovery tool — keep.

bloat_concerns.concern: apex_decision_audit.jsonl at 4MB and growing
bloat_concerns.reason: Every Apex decision is audited. No size cap. This duplicates information in apex_conversation_log.jsonl.
bloat_concerns.action: Implement rotation or deduplication with apex_conversation_log.jsonl.

bloat_concerns.concern: test_orders_execute.py is 100% TODO stubs — no real assertions
bloat_concerns.reason: 11 test functions all contain only TODO comments. This file provides false confidence of coverage for critical execution paths (stop-loss, bracket orders, options contract selection, partial fills).
bloat_concerns.action: Implement the 11 test cases OR delete the file. Do not leave TODO-only test files in CI.

bloat_concerns.concern: Chief-Decifer-recovered/ contains compiled .pyc bytecode in git
bloat_concerns.reason: __pycache__ directories and .pyc files should never be committed to git. They are machine-specific Python 3.11 bytecode.
bloat_concerns.action: Add to .gitignore. Delete committed bytecode files. This is a housekeeping issue.

bloat_concerns.concern: Two macOS app bundles checked into git (Decifer Trading.app, Decifer.app)
bloat_concerns.reason: Binary blobs in git inflate repo size. App bundles should be distributed separately, not version-controlled.
bloat_concerns.action: Add to .gitignore. Distribute as separate release artifacts.

bloat_concerns.concern: apex_prompt_snapshot.jsonl + apex_response_snapshot.jsonl (3.7MB combined debug artifacts)
bloat_concerns.reason: Debug snapshots only. Already have apex_conversation_log.jsonl as the canonical record. Three overlapping Apex logs.
bloat_concerns.action: Consider whether prompt/response snapshots are needed separately from conversation log. If not, disable and remove.

bloat_concerns.concern: Advisory layer (advisory_reporter.py + advisory_logger [as advisor] + advisory_log_reviewer.py) — 64KB of flagged-off code
bloat_concerns.reason: intelligence_first_advisory_enabled=False. These modules are not called in any live cycle. They represent an entire feature tier that is currently inactive.
bloat_concerns.action: Cloud exclusion after intelligence-first activation. Archive or delete advisory_log_reviewer and advisory_reporter post-cutover.

bloat_concerns.concern: handoff_publisher_observer.py (39KB) + paper_handoff_comparator.py (37KB) — shadow observation only
bloat_concerns.reason: These are shadow-mode only tools for comparing paper vs live handoffs. After activation is confirmed they serve no purpose.
bloat_concerns.action: Retire after activation confirmed. Cloud exclusion candidate.

bloat_concerns.concern: 6 .fail_* files accumulating in data/live/
bloat_concerns.reason: Failed handoff attempt records from 2026-05-07. No cleanup mechanism — these will accumulate indefinitely.
bloat_concerns.action: Implement automatic cleanup of .fail_* files older than 7 days. Delete the 6 existing ones now.

bloat_concerns.concern: tier_d_funnel.jsonl at 2.9MB for Phase 1 evidence only
bloat_concerns.reason: Tier D Phase 1 evidence collection. After Phase 2 gate decision, this file's evidence purpose is fulfilled. Will grow unboundedly if not capped.
bloat_concerns.action: After Phase 2 gate reviewed with Amit, cap to last 1000 entries or archive the current file.

bloat_concerns.concern: factor_registry.py is 61KB but not in live import chain
bloat_concerns.reason: 61KB factor registry only referenced by intelligence_schema_validator.py (also not in live chain). No live runtime value.
bloat_concerns.action: Cloud exclusion. Move to intelligence/offline/ or similar. Never deploy to live container.

bloat_concerns.concern: audit_candle_gate.py not imported by entry_gate or any live chain module
bloat_concerns.reason: Expected to be used in entry validation, but AST import analysis shows it's not in the live transitive closure. May be a dead code path from an old pipeline.
bloat_concerns.action: Investigate: is it called dynamically (importlib) or via bot.py scheduler? If unused, retire.

bloat_concerns.concern: candidate_resolver.py has no callers in live chain
bloat_concerns.reason: Module exists but is not imported by scanner, entry_gate, or any live-chain module. May be a residual from old pipeline or intended for intelligence layer.
bloat_concerns.action: Investigate: if not actively called, this is dead code from the pre-Apex pipeline.

bloat_concerns.concern: build_brain.py (47KB) is in repo root alongside bot.py
bloat_concerns.reason: Offline ML training tool at top level. Should be in scripts/ or ml/ directory to make the repo root's intent clearer.
bloat_concerns.action: Move to scripts/ or an ml/ subdirectory. Cloud exclusion candidate.

bloat_concerns.concern: quota_capacity_calibrator.py (33KB) — calibration already run, results in data/live/
bloat_concerns.reason: Quota calibration was run and 5 scenario results are persisted in data/live/. The calibrator served its purpose but remains at top level.
bloat_concerns.action: Move to scripts/ post-activation. Cloud exclusion candidate.
